title: Totem of Revival
description: Bring back players in a Hardcore world!
body:
Created as a part of [this video](https://youtu.be/bzXLt6AN6t8).

This is a basic mod which adds grave markers which are left behind when players die on a Hardcore server. Right clicking one of these graves with a Totem of Undying in your main hand will bring the player back to life. Simple as that!


Suggested by ToxicBenji over at http://dc.blur.lol
